calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Paula Bibbs.

Ms. Navia stated that distribution without Court order was a mistake on their part, that the Beneficiary was dealing with a medical issue and had to move from a larger home to a smaller home, that they were dealing with the timing of escrow and other issues, and that Ms. Hutchins is the sole Beneficiary and gave consent. The Court raised the issue of a discrepancy in the numbers, stated that none of it takes into account the statutory losses and spoke of the intent of a voluntary reduction. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is taken under submission without approval of the preliminary distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order
